evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: perform code reviews, enforce best practices in DAX, data modeling, and Power BI
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The only signals present are quality/practice-enforcement related (code reviews, best practices, dashboard performance tuning) with no velocity language anywhere, so it defaults to rigour.
evidence.domain_risk: Experience in sectors such as energy, banking, telecom, or public sector is a strong plus.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Preferred sector exposure includes regulated industries but this is a consultancy role without explicit financial-reporting, audit, or compliance responsibilities stated, so it is moderate.
evidence.data_team_maturity: By joining Netcompany in Athens, you will be part of a vivid team of 2,300+ tech professionals.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The role sits within a 2,300+ person tech organisation delivering large-scale cross-functional projects with a mentoring layer for BI engineers, indicating a mature, established practice.
evidence.jd_authorship: Work on projects involving advanced KPI tracking, including user churn, app engagement, and load performance metrics.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The JD names precise tools (DAX, Power Query, SSAS) and specific KPI types (user churn, app engagement, load performance), giving a concrete picture of the work, so it is hiring_manager.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Focus on delivering analytics for sales performance, customer behavior, and forecasting.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The primary analytics focus named is sales performance and forecasting, placing the orientation as commercial.
evidence.autonomy_level: Lead the BI workstream within large-scale, cross-functional projects. Own the design and delivery of end-to-end BI solutions...Guide the data strategy
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Verbs like 'lead', 'own', and 'guide' throughout the responsibilities section indicate the role sets direction rather than executing scoped tasks, so it is strategic.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools expected of the candidate or AI systems consuming the candidate's output anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: The JD mentions code reviews and best practices but no data quality, testing framework, or data contract language, so it is absent.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD frames the role in terms of ownership, delivery, and impact scale rather than risk, compliance, or stakeholder-trust language.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Own the design and delivery of end-to-end BI solutions: from data modeling and architecture to BI dashboards and executive-level reporting.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role spans full end-to-end solution design across varied client projects with no consistent greenfield or fix-only signal, so it is mixed.
evidence.work_arrangement: Employees work in a hybrid mode
